step.name: assess
step.input: Team list + timezone + sprint cadence decision
step.action: Identify viable ceremony slots; surface timezone constraints.

step.name: configure
step.action: Draft ceremonies config: purpose, time-box, attendees, owner, output per ceremony.
step.decision-gate: Reject ceremonies missing purpose or time-box.

step.name: bootstrap
step.action: Copy planning/retro templates; configure standup bot; share with team.

step.name: measure
step.action: Track ceremony hours; compute overhead_pct vs sprint capacity.

step.name: tune
step.action: If overhead > 10%, retune time-boxes or merge ceremonies; bump retro action.
